goal: is_set_upper_bound(s, u) = forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies x0 <= u }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 <= x1 } = is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) }(s, u)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 <= u }(z)

goal: is_set_upper_bound(s, b) = forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies x0 <= b }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 <= x1 } = is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) }(s, b)

(forall(x0: Real) { not is_set_upper_bound(s, x0) or sup_s <= x0 } = true)
